extension.name: Product Spec Extension
extension.description: Generates PRFAQ, Lean PRD, stakeholder summaries, and technical designs from engineering specs.
extension.author: d0whc3r

commands.name: speckit.product.spec
commands.description: Generate a product spec and quality checklist from the current feature's spec.md

commands.name: speckit.product.info
commands.description: Generate a short, stakeholder-readable product-info.md from the current feature's spec.md

commands.name: speckit.product.plan
commands.description: Generate a high-level, product-oriented plan from the current feature's plan.md

commands.name: speckit.product.design
commands.description: Generate a high-level technical design document from the current feature's plan.md and spec.md, aimed at tech leads and senior developers

hooks.prompt: Generate the stakeholder summary product/00-info.md from the new spec.md?
hooks.description: Generate product/00-info.md from spec.md (recommended first artifact)

hooks.prompt: Regenerate the stakeholder summary after clarification?
hooks.description: Update product/00-info.md from the clarified spec.md

hooks.prompt: Generate the product-facing plan product/20-plan.md from plan.md?
